violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager * had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. - ServeSafe Expired

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice scoop being stored in an unsanitary manner.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls in the back require a thorough cleaning.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
